evals.prompt: Give me the latest AI news from the last 24 hours, focusing on open-source models and agent frameworks.
evals.expected_output: Runs the fetch script with --region global --hours 24 --keywords, returns a deduplicated list of AI news items sorted newest first, grouped by region.

evals.prompt: I need a daily AI briefing covering both China and global sources. Format it as markdown.
evals.expected_output: Runs the fetch script with default region coverage (cn + global), outputs markdown with per-item title, summary, source link, and published date.

evals.prompt: Collect AI news updates from Chinese sources only for the past 48 hours and export as JSON.
evals.expected_output: Runs the fetch script with --region cn --hours 48 --format json, produces structured JSON output with all required fields.
